name: Cucumber Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the prepared mustard with 2/3 cup of vinegar.
2. Add 4 cups of vinegar and the remaining ingredients to the mixture.
3. Cover and bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
5. Pack the hot, sterilized jars with the pickling liquid.
6. Seal the jars immediately.
Makes 9 pints.
